title: Duel in the Coruscant Underlevels
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conflicting|[[Star Wars: Republic: Dreadnaughts of Rendili]]|[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Duel |prev=[[Battle of Rendili]][[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] |conc= |next=*[[Mission to Anzat]][[Republic 72|''Republic'' 72]] *[[Second battle of Duro|Battle of Duro]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Battle of Commenor (Clone Wars)|Battle of Commenor]] *[[Battle of Balmorra (Clone Wars)|Battle of Balmorra]] |image=[[File:ASvAV.jpg]] |name=Duel in the Coruscant Underlevels |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |date=[[20 BBY/Legends|19.48 BBY]] (2 [[Standard year/Legends|years]], 6 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]) |place=[[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |result=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] victory **[[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] presumed [[Death/Legends|dead]] |side1=[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Order |side2=[[Order of the Sith Lords]] |side3= |side4= |forces1=[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] |forces2=[[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] Asajj Ventress |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Scarred over right [[Eye/Legends|eye]] |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|First, I will kill the thing you love, then I will kill you.''"
"''No, first I'll kill you!|Asajj Ventress threatens Anakin Skywalker|}} A '''duel''' took place in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], between renowned [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and the [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Underlevels]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|I came to Coruscant seeking Vos, but he and Kenobi are not accessible at the moment. You, however, I can reach-and we will start with pain.|Asajj Ventress|}} After the [[Battle of Rendili]], where the renegade [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] turned himself in, he was taken to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for judgment before the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who had participated in the battle, delivered a testimony regarding Vos' actions during the battle. Having done this, Skywalker was excused. Immediately afterwards, Skywalker journeyed to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] [[Senate Building/Legends|Office Building]] to meet with his secret wife [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. He was instead greeted by one of her [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]] who told him that Senator Amidala was tied up with Senate business, while giving him a [[Hologram disc/Legends|holodisc]] from her. As Skywalker traveled to the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant Underlevels]] to listen to the [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]], he was unaware that he was being tailed by [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. Ventress revealed herself, catching Skywalker on his speeder in a decrepit building, listening to the hologram. She took it from him with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and listened to it with disgust before destroying it. Ventress told Skywalker that she was on Coruscant hunting down Quinlan Vos and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], before she decided to settle for him. She then proceeded to threaten Senator Amidala's life; Skywalker, who thus became enraged, viciously attacked. ==The duel== [[File:Anakin_maimed.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Asajj Ventress slashing Anakin Skywalker's face]] Easily fending off Skywalker's strikes, Ventress commented on how pitiful his attack was. Overleaping a slash at her legs, she asked herself why she was wasting time with Skywalker when she could be looking for Senator Amidala. With that, Ventress retreated further into the building, with an enraged Anakin Skywalker in hot pursuit. Ambushing the Jedi, Ventress managed to [[Shiim/Legends|slash]] Skywalker across the face, leaving him with a scar on his jaw. As they leapt apart, Ventress quickly pressed the attack. As they fought, Ventress managed to again slash Skywalker across the face, leaving him with his distinctive vertical scar next to his eye. Skywalker returned the favor, slashing her across the left cheek. Scarcely noticing the injury, Ventress taunted that she could have decapitated Skywalker with that stroke, and stated that in their last contest, Skywalker got lucky. She went so far as to say that she would teach Skywalker a last lesson regarding the superiority of the Dark Side before she killed him. Unfortunately for her, she pushed Skywalker too far, causing him to snap completely. [[File:Electriccables.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Ventress at Anakin's mercy]] Unleashing a flurry of destructive blows, Skywalker drove Ventress to the edge of the building, before blasting her off the edge and telekinetically entangling her in a number of live electrical wires. He then [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] her by [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Grip|holding her in the wires]] with the Force as she was electrocuted, before he finally dropped her. The wires snapped, unable to take Ventress' weight, and she became further entangled as she fell into a pit below. Skywalker stared at the pit for a few seconds, before turning his back on his defeated enemy, and leaving. ==Aftermath== By submitting to his rage during that fight, Anakin Skywalker had pushed himself closer to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and his own eventual fall. Despite her extreme injuries, Asajj Ventress survived. ==Appearances== *[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] {{1st}} *[[Obsession 1|''Obsession'' 1]] {{Mo}} *[[Obsession 2|''Obsession'' 2]] {{Mo}} *[[Obsession 3|''Obsession'' 3]] {{Mo}} *[[Obsession 4|''Obsession'' 4]] {{Mo}} *[[Obsession 5|''Obsession'' 5]] {{Mo}} *''[[The Rise and Fall of Darth Vader]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Duelo en los niveles bajos de Coruscant }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Coruscant Underlevels, duel in the}} [[Category:Battles of Coruscant]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]] [[Category:Duels]]
